message: The finest weapons of the Halfling are forged here.
Our armor protects the warriors of the Halfling.
Travelers are always welcome among the Halfling. I also collect many curios and cultural items from our people.
The Gnome grandmaster stole our sacred sigil. Bring it back and you shall earn our favor.
